metadata.author: Matthew
metadata.subject: The Gospel of the Kingdom — Proclaiming That Christ Is the King-Savior.

1: The book of the generation of Jesus Christ, the son of David, the son of Abraham.
Behold, the virgin shall be with child and shall bear a son, and they shall call His name Emmanuel (which is interpreted, God with us).
5: Blessed are the poor in spirit, for theirs is the kingdom of the heavens.
You are the light of the world. It is impossible for a city situated on a mountain to be hidden.
28: Go therefore and disciple all the nations, baptizing them into the name of the Father and of the Son and of the Holy Spirit.
And behold, I am with you all the days until the consummation of the age.

1.text: The genealogy of Christ links Him to David (the kingdom) and Abraham (the blessing), showing Him as the fulfillment of all God's promises.

19.text: Baptizing people 'into' the name of the Trinity signifies a spiritual union, bringing the believers into a dynamic, organic relationship with the Triune God.
